title: Ushijima the Loan Shark 3
original_title: 闇金ウシジマくん Part3
overview: Sawamura, a contract part-timer dragged into a multi-million yen internet business, and Kamo, an office worker who lavished money on a beautiful club hostess, arrive at Cowcow Finance, the office of black-market lender Ushijima.

trailers.title: 映画『闇金ウシジマくん Part3』予告編
